title: polygala obliqua
intro: Polygala obliqua, also known as Yin Yang Huo, is a type of flowering plant native to China and used in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Polygala obliqua include the improvement of kidney function, enhancement of immune system, and reduction of fatigue and weakness. In herbal preparations, Polygala obliqua is often used in combination with other herbs, such as ginseng and licorice root, and is typically consumed in the form of decoctions or capsules.
